# Beta Release Checklist

- [ ] Version and changelog updated
- [ ] Beta/WIP wording visible in README, metadata, landing page, and hosted app
- [ ] License and source-available terminology reviewed
- [ ] Secret/generated-artifact scan reviewed
- [ ] Frontend lint, typecheck, unit tests, and production build pass
- [ ] API lint/syntax, tests, dependency audit, and migration drift checks pass
- [ ] Fresh migration upgrade and projection backfill/parity pass
- [ ] Manual QA, accessibility, security, import, and large-roadmap checks pass
- [ ] Redis/multi-worker realtime regression passes for scaled deployment
- [ ] Database backup and rollback plan verified
- [ ] Staging release reviewed before production
- [ ] Demo data contains no private information
- [ ] Release notes state known limitations and data-backup expectations
